content: Clerk multi-org: User.getOrganizationMemberships() returns paginated list of OrganizationMembership objects. On Android: Clerk.user?.getOrganizationMemberships() returns ClerkResult. setActive activates org for current session. JWT after setActive carries org_id and org_role for activated org. The SessionClaims.ActiveOrganizationID field contains org_id; empty string when no active org. Backend rule: each handler must check claims.ActiveOrganizationID against child's clerk_org_id. Prebuilt OrganizationSwitcher component released 2026-06-05 for both iOS and Android.
